headline: 'SPACs Attack' Weekly Recap: Looking Back On 5 Deals, Rumors And Headline News
summary:
It was another busy week for the SPAC market with numerous deal announcements and rumored deals. Benzinga's "Spacs Attack" covered the deals and news of the week. 

Here is a look back at the announced deals, rumors and some top headlines.

headline: Is Now The Time To Buy Stock In Peloton, Uber, Apple Or Carnival?
summary:
One of the most common questions traders have about stocks is “Why Is It Moving?”

That’s why Benzinga created the Why Is It Moving, or WIIM, feature in Benzinga Pro. WIIMs are a one-sentence description as to why that stock is moving.

Here’s the latest news and updates for Peloton, Uber, Apple and Carnival.
